common_issues: P0: Internal link duplicates - every article has 3 internal links that appear 2x each (e.g., tasker-alternative, xiaomi-ai-ecosystem, voice-control-visually-impaired appear twice in body)
Note: content optimization script (seo_quality_check.py) does not support 'id' language - falls back to 'en', causing false E-E-A-T and FAQ failures

summary: Indonesian site (id) passes all 17 visual QA checks and all 12 content optimization article checks. Key findings: (1) All pages have correct lang="id", 15 hreflangs, 14 language switcher options, localized APK CTA, unique H1, 8 community cards, 12 resource cards, 3 related articles per article page. (2) All 12 articles have E-E-A-T (5-7 matches using Indonesian patterns like 'pengujian kami', 'berdasarkan'), FAQ with 'Pertanyaan yang Sering Diajukan' and 5 questions, 5 unique internal links, word count 1276-1431, no banned words, no Chinese leak. (3) Only issue: internal link duplicates in article body (3 links appear 2x each). (4) content optimization script bug: does not detect 'id' language, needs update to add 'id' to EEAT_PATTERNS and FAQ_TITLES.
